basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Project Associate Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Roorkee to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Roorkee to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Project Associate positions at IIT Roorkee is 26th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Associate position is a B.Tech degree in Electronics and Communication (EC), Electrical Engineering (EE), or Computer Science (CS).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Associate post in the Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Associate role will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus HRA as per institute rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate positions at IIT Roorkee involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIT Roorkee Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Associate recruitment at IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIT Roorkee Project Associate recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate positions at IIT Roorkee are contractual in nature. This means the appointment will be for a specific period as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, India.

faq.question: Q10. Who can apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates who have completed their B.Tech in EC, EE, or CS and meet other eligibility criteria as per the official notification are eligible to apply for the Project Associate positions.
